description: WhiteFiber, Inc. provides AI-focused infrastructure solutions through the development and operation of GPU-optimized data centers and cloud platforms. The company offers colocation, hosting, and GPU-as-a-service, supporting compute, storage, and networking needs for AI and machine learning workloads. WhiteFiber operates on a vertically integrated model and was spun off from Bit Digital, Inc. before going public in August 2025. It is headquartered in the United States.
